common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete?
common.name: Name

errors.emailTaken: This email is already in use
errors.lastAdmin: Cannot deactivate or demote the last administrator
errors.passwordShort: Password too short — at least 8 characters
errors.passwordRequired: A password is required for a new user
errors.yearArchived: That academic year is archived — its sessions and money records cannot be changed.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
errors.duplicate: Duplicate value — the QID, employee no. or teacher is already used by another record.
errors.invalid_qid: The QID must be exactly 11 digits.
errors.leaveOverlap: This employee already has approved or pending leave overlapping this period.
errors.alreadyDecided: This request has already been decided.
errors.monthHasRun: A run already exists for this month.
errors.runPaid: A paid run cannot be deleted.
errors.noHireDate: This employee has no hire date.
errors.alreadySettled: An end-of-service settlement already exists for this employee.

common.errorGeneric: Could not save — please check the details
common.nameEnHint: Optional — shown when the interface is in English.

auth.loginSubtitle: Enter your credentials to access the system
auth.locked: Too many failed attempts — try again in 10 minutes

sessions.title: Daily Sessions
sessions.priceAuto: Price is calculated automatically from grade level and location
sessions.searchPlaceholder: Search by student, teacher or date…

group.title: Group booking
group.noGradeWarn: {n} selected have no grade level — set a grade override or they will be skipped.
group.tooMany: Too many sessions in one batch — reduce students, weekdays, or weeks.

calendar.title: Schedule
calendar.subtitle: Drag to reschedule, drag the bottom edge to change duration, click an empty slot to book.

checkin.title: Check-in / Check-out
checkin.subtitle: Record today in one tap — mark all present, then fix the exceptions.
checkin.locationFar: You are {m} m from the saved home ({max} m allowed)
checkin.locationNoHome: No home location saved for this student
checkin.manualHint: The code printed under the student card.

scanErrors.noSessionToday: No session for this student today
scanErrors.noGradeLevel: Student has no grade level set

checkin.reviewHint: Completed by the system after their end time.
checkin.cardsSubtitle: Print and hand these out so students can check in by scanning.
checkin.noCards: No cards yet — press "Generate missing cards".
checkin.scanSubtitle: Hold the student card up to the camera — attendance records itself.
checkin.noDayTeachers: No teacher recorded a session on this day.
checkin.walkInFlagHint: No session today? One is created without a teacher for you to assign later.

cameraErrors.insecure: The camera only works over a secure connection (HTTPS).
cameraErrors.unsupported: This browser cannot open the camera.
cameraErrors.notFound: No camera was found on this device.
cameraErrors.failed: The camera could not be started.

cameraHints.insecure: Open the page over https:// or from localhost, then try again.
cameraHints.unsupported: Use a recent Chrome, Edge or Safari, or type the code below.
cameraHints.denied: Allow camera access from the lock icon next to the address bar, then reload.
cameraHints.notFound: Connect a camera or use a device that has one, or type the code below.
cameraHints.failed: Another app may be using the camera. Close it and reload, or type the code.

checkin.fallbackDecoder: This browser uses a fallback reader — scanning may be a little slower. Hold the card close and steady.

students.title: Students
students.homeCodeHint: Short location code (zone/street/building or compound name) shown to the teacher on the planner for home sessions.
students.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or grade…
students.assignedTeachersHint: Teachers who teach this student this year — they appear first when booking.

map.title: Pick location on map
map.hint: Click the map to drop a pin, or drag it to fine-tune.

teachers.title: Teachers
teachers.searchPlaceholder: Search by teacher name or phone…
teachers.earningsModeHint: Salary only, commission only, or both.
teachers.paymentModeHint: How often the payout is cut.

guardians.title: Guardians
guardians.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, phone or email…

payments.title: Payments
payments.searchPlaceholder: Search by student or receipt no…
payments.amountPrefilledHint: Pre-filled with the outstanding balance — edit it for a part payment.

payroll.title: Teacher dues
payroll.advancesHint: Money already advanced, deducted from the payout.
payroll.earningsExcluded: {part} is not counted for this teacher under their earnings basis.

settings.title: Settings
settings.teacherCanConfirm: Let teachers confirm their own sessions
settings.teacherCanConfirmHint: When on, a teacher can mark their own draft as taught from their portal.
settings.earningsIntro: Choose how teacher dues are worked out: a fixed salary, commission on what is collected, or both.
settings.earningsDefaultHint: Applies to every teacher without a mode of their own.
settings.earningsApplyAllHint: Overwrites each active teacher's own mode. "Follow default" clears their override instead.
settings.earningsOverrideCount: {n} of {total} teachers have their own mode.

integrations.keepKeyHint: A key is already saved. Leave blank to keep it.
integrations.advancedHelp: Adjust these to match your provider's API docs — no code change needed.

planner.title: Daily planner
planner.subtitle: Plan each teacher's day as drafts, then confirm what was actually taught.
planner.timeAutoHint: Time is auto-suggested after the teacher's last session — editable.
planner.settingsHint: Used to suggest and compact session times.
planner.moveHint: Time is suggested from the target teacher's schedule — adjust before saving.
planner.dragHint: Drag any draft onto another teacher's row to move it.
planner.templatesHint: Recurring weekly sessions. "Generate day" turns them into drafts for the shown day.
planner.copiedNone: Nothing to copy from last week
planner.printTeachersHint: Teachers with sessions today are selected automatically.
planner.printExtraSlotsHint: Columns to fill in by hand. Zero = used columns only.
planner.printSummary: {teachers} teachers across {columns} columns will be printed.
planner.timetableDisclaimer: This timetable is a plan and is subject to change.

timetableErrors.forbidden: You do not have permission for this action.
timetableErrors.invalid: The date range is not valid.

users.keepPasswordHint: Leave blank to keep the current password

data.title: Data import & export
data.hint: Export any table to Excel, or download a blank template and import it once filled.
data.seedHint: Generates demo data and restores grade levels, price matrix and expense categories.
data.wipeHint: Deletes every record, keeping administrator accounts and centre settings.
data.wipeWarning: This cannot be undone. Students, teachers, sessions, payments, expenses and all logs will be deleted.
data.wipeKeeps: Kept: administrator accounts, centre profile and logo, integration settings.

availability.title: Weekly working hours
availability.hint: Used to warn when a session is booked outside the teacher's hours — advisory only, it never blocks saving.
availability.emptyHint: No working hours set — the teacher counts as always available and no warnings appear.
availability.copyToWeek: Copy to the rest of the week
availability.invalidRange: The end must be after the start

conflicts.title: Scheduling warnings
conflicts.teacherBusy: The teacher already has a session with {name} at this time
conflicts.teacherBusyPlain: The teacher already has another session at this time
conflicts.studentBusy: The student already has a session with {name} at this time
conflicts.studentBusyPlain: The student already has another session at this time
conflicts.advisory: Advisory only — you can still save.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Attendance, revenue, packages, payroll and outstanding balances.

portal.parentSubtitle: Your children's sessions, balance, receipts and packages.
portal.confirmDisabledHint: Sessions are confirmed by centre staff.
portal.noChildren: No students are linked to your account. Please contact the centre.
portal.createLoginHint: Creates a portal-only account. Hand the password over so they can change it later.

errors.emailTaken: That email is already in use
errors.alreadyLinked: A login already exists for this record

leads.title: Leads
leads.subtitle: Track enquiries from first contact through to enrolment.
leads.dragHint: Drag a card to another column to change its status.
leads.trialHint: Booked as a zero-price draft: visible on the calendar and planner, invisible to the ledger.
leads.convertHint: Creates a student record linked to this lead.
leads.convertHintWithTrials: Promotes the existing trial record to an enrolled student, keeping its history.
leads.guardianOptional: Optional — a guardian record is created when a name is given.

errors.alreadyConverted: This lead has already been converted

attendanceSettings.title: Attendance settings
attendanceSettings.pickSessionLabel: Show all of today's sessions and let me pick
attendanceSettings.pickSessionHint: When off, the scan records against the session nearest to now.

walkInModes.FLAG: Create one without a teacher and flag it
walkInModes.ASSIGN: Create one with the student's usual teacher
walkInModes.ASK: Refuse and ask staff to book

walkInHints.FLAG: Fastest while staying in control — no payroll moves before assignment.
walkInHints.ASSIGN: Uses the assigned teacher only when there is exactly one; otherwise left unassigned.
walkInHints.ASK: Shows an error at the kiosk so staff can book the session.

attendanceSettings.graceHoursHint: A session left unmarked this long after it ends is completed by the system and flagged for review.

years.title: Academic years
years.intro: Archiving a year freezes its sessions, payments, payouts and expenses. Student and teacher records stay editable, and reports and statements keep working.
years.rolloverHint: Creates the new year, makes it current, and archives the previous one in one step.
years.archiveWarning: {n} money and attendance records will be frozen — still viewable, no longer editable.

errors.cannotArchiveCurrent: Cannot archive the current year — set another one current first
errors.cannotCurrentArchived: An archived year cannot be current
errors.cannotDeleteArchived: Cannot delete an archived year — unarchive it first

hr.title: Human resources
hr.subtitle: Staff register, documents and expiry alerts — everyone at the centre, not only teachers.
hr.qidHint: 11 digits. Leave blank if not issued yet.
hr.visaHint: Used while no QID has been issued.
hr.linkedTeacherHint: Link when this employee also teaches — one payslip combines salary and commission.
hr.basicSalaryHint: End-of-service gratuity is calculated on basic only.
hr.terminateHint: The record is not deleted — it becomes Terminated and leave accrual stops. Documents and payslips remain.

leave.title: Leave
leave.subtitle: Staff leave balances and requests — per Qatar labour law.
leave.adjustHint: Positive credits the balance (opening/carry-forward), negative debits it.
leave.calendarDaysNote: Annual leave is counted in calendar days.

runs.title: Payroll runs
runs.subtitle: Generate a monthly run for all staff, settle it, and print signable payslips.
runs.employeesHint: Everyone is selected by default — a normal payroll run covers all staff.
runs.noEmployees: No employees yet — add them in HR first.
runs.monthHasRunWarning: A run already exists for {month}. Press "Generate anyway" if this is a corrective or off-cycle run.
runs.runSubtitle: {n} payslips — review, print for signatures, then settle.
runs.signEmployee: Employee signature — I received the amount above
runs.printFooter: Payslips for {month} — one page per employee, for signature.
runs.wpsBlocked: The WPS file cannot be generated — complete the missing data:
runs.wpsBlockedHint: Establishment and payer details live in Settings; employee details (QID/visa, bank, IBAN, basic salary above zero) live in HR.

wpsIssues.employerEID: Employer EID invalid — set it in Settings.
wpsIssues.payer: Set the payer in Settings: EID or QID (exactly one).
wpsIssues.payerBankShortName: Choose the payer bank in Settings.
wpsIssues.records: No employee-linked payslips on this run.
wpsIssues.qid: Enter a QID (11 digits) or a visa ID — exactly one.
wpsIssues.name: Name missing or over 70 characters.
wpsIssues.bankShortName: Pick the employee's bank from the list.
wpsIssues.account: Enter a valid IBAN for the employee.
wpsIssues.basicSalary: Basic salary must be above zero.

eos.title: End of service — {name}
eos.unusedLeaveHint: Check the leave page — encashed at the basic daily rate.
eos.needsHireDate: Cannot compute without a hire date — add it on the employee record first.
eos.unpaidNote: On save, the server subtracts approved unpaid-leave days from the service period.
eos.terminatesWarning: Saving permanently ends the employment and records the settlement.

wps.intro: Details for the Salary Information File (SIF) uploaded to the bank: the establishment ID from the registration card and the account salaries are paid from.
wps.employerEIDHint: 7 or 8 digits from the establishment registration card.
wps.payerHint: Usually the same as the Employer EID. Leave blank if the payer is an individual.
wps.payerQidHint: Only when the payer is an individual — one of the two, never both.
